Comfortable Accommodations: Karibu BB Suites in Entebbe offers family rooms with private bathrooms, balconies, and lake views. Each room includes a sofa bed, walk-in shower, and free WiFi.
Dining and Leisure: The family-friendly restaurant serves Indian cuisine for lunch and dinner, including vegetarian and vegan options. Guests can relax on the terrace or enjoy the outdoor seating area.
Convenient Location: Located 3 km from Entebbe International Airport, the hotel is a 15-minute walk from Entebbe Golf Club Play Ground. Nearby attractions include UWEC's Beach (2.1 km) and Entebbe Golf Club (3 km).
Exceptional Service: Highly rated for its attentive staff and excellent service support, the hotel provides private check-in and check-out, a 24-hour front desk, and free on-site parking.
